chain.thought: Explanation: The fastest Japanese time was 10.64 (Hiroyasu Tsuchie and Yuta Kanno), while the fastest Thai time was 10.72 (Reanchai Srihawong). Since 10.64 is faster than 10.72, Japan finished earlier.

judge_thought:
Explanation: The earliest (fastest) times are:
- Japan: 10.64 (Hiroyasu Tsuchie in Heat 1; Yuta Kanno in Heat 2)
- Thailand: 10.72 (Reanchai Srihawong in Heat 3; Vissanu Sophanich 10.87 in Heat 1)
Since 10.64 < 10.72, Japan finished earlier than Thailand.
